overview: ReviveRoots is a premium AI-powered cultural revival platform that helps users rediscover lost traditions, languages, crafts, and ancestral identities. Features a complete authentication system, 8 interactive heritage modules, and a personalized dashboard — all styled with a dark, heritage-themed glassmorphism UI.
features: Complete signup and login with email, password, and full name validation
Persistent sessions using Internet Identity — stay logged in across visits
Personalized dashboard greeting users by name with activity stats
Protected routes for all 8 modules — unauthenticated users redirected to login
User profiles stored in backend canister linked to all activity
Heritage Scanner, Language Revival, AR Time Travel, StoryKeeper, Traditions, Digital Gurukul, Marketplace, Festival Planner modules
Password strength indicator, loading states, and clear error handling
Google-style authentication UI with passkey and biometrics support
Logout from anywhere in the app with session cleanup
Graceful forgot password flow directing to Caffeine support
